use_cases: Display currently reading book on personal portfolios and websites
Create reading progress trackers for book blogger dashboards
Build Goodreads integrations for media and content platforms
Add personal reading widgets to developer profiles and bios
Embed real-time book data on reading community platforms
ai_summary: A Goodreads integration widget that fetches and displays the user's currently reading book from Goodreads RSS feeds, showing book cover image, title, author, rating, and publication year. The component handles data fetching, XML parsing, and loading/error states, rendering book information in a clean card format with an external link to the Goodreads book page.
